codeReview.summary: The feature adds the requested superadmin endpoints, role guard, usage-metrics interceptor wiring, and tests, but it has a blocking correctness bug in usage tracking (lost increments under concurrency) and a non-blocking scalability issue in tenant listing/dashboard aggregation due to N+1 query patterns.

issues.description: `recordApiCall` performs a read-then-write increment (`getApiCallCount` then `save`) without any lock/version check, so concurrent requests for the same tenant can overwrite each other and undercount API usage. This breaks the expected behavior of reliable per-tenant API-call tracking for superadmin dashboards/usage endpoints.

`listTenants` loads all companies and then `toTenantDto` executes per-tenant repository calls for users, audit-storage, API-call count, and last activity. Dashboard reuses this list, so aggregate reads trigger N+1 query/lookup patterns that can degrade significantly as tenant count grows.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The feature commit modifies `.factory/library/frontend-handoff.md` even though mission AGENTS says not to modify `.factory/` mission infrastructure; this should be clarified because another AGENTS section simultaneously mandates frontend-handoff updates for API changes.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: AGENTS.md:13 says 'Do NOT modify .factory/ directory contents (mission infrastructure)' while AGENTS.md:101 requires updating `.factory/library/frontend-handoff.md`; commit 3bf4beb7 includes `.factory/library/frontend-handoff.md` changes.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Skill procedure mismatch: backend-worker mandates TDD first, but worker reported implementing before tests and marked followedProcedure=false; this appears recurring for cross-cutting endpoint/interceptor work and suggests the skill needs an explicit allowed scaffold-first exception.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Handoff skillFeedback has `followedProcedure: false` with deviation on 'Step 2: Write Tests First (TDD)' in handoff file 2026-02-28T06-47-27-131Z__superadmin-dashboard-and-controls__b4e432c8-d861-4627-8509-87666e090403.json.

summary: Reviewed feature superadmin-dashboard-and-controls (commit 3bf4beb7) against feature requirements, transcript skeleton, and handoff. Implementation scope is largely complete (endpoints, role guard, telemetry, tests), but a blocking race condition in API-call counting can lose usage events under concurrent traffic, so review status is fail until fixed.
